name: Lia Samantha G. Pitero
objective: Motivated and eager Computer Science student seeking an On-the-Job Training opportunity in Full-Stack Development or Software Engineering. Experienced in building web-based applications using React.js, Node.js, JavaScript, PHP/Laravel, PostgreSQL, Python, and Firebase through academic and self-made projects. Passionate about building practical, user-focused applications that solve real problems — particularly for students and everyday users.
profile: Highly motivated and detail-oriented college student with strong communication, organizational, and problem-solving skills. Demonstrates the ability to work effectively both independently and in team environments. Committed to delivering quality work, maintaining professionalism, and continuously developing personal and professional competencies.
bio: My journey into coding was driven by a genuine desire to solve real-world problems. Seeing most CS/IT students spend countless hours struggling without effective digital tools pushed me to act. I am determined to become a successful programmer — one who can develop meaningful solutions to the technology challenges we face today.
